description: A panoramic river scene showing the stone bridge at Grez-sur-Loing. Two small boats are on the calm water: a figure in a dark outfit rows in the foreground, while further back two figures share a lighter boat near the bridge arches. Lush green trees overhang the far bank, and their reflections shimmer in the still water. The bridge has multiple arched spans. The light is soft and diffused, creating a peaceful, impressionistic atmosphere.
